steps.title: Set up the tangent ratio for angle x
steps.content:
The triangle has a right angle at the bottom right corner. From angle $x$ at the top, the opposite side is 32 (the base) and the adjacent side is 32 (the vertical side).

$$\tan(x) = \frac{32}{32} = 1$$

steps.title: Solve for x using inverse tangent
steps.content:
Find the angle whose tangent equals 1:

$$x = \arctan(1) = 45°$$
